name: Riya Sharma
review: Instant glow, love it!

review: Gives a nice glow without making my skin greasy.

review: The texture is really light and blends easily. The gold shade suits my skin tone perfectly.

review: Very lightweight and gives a natural glow. I use it daily before makeup and it works great as a primer.

name: Simran Dhillon
review: Rose gold is my fav!

name: Neha Verma
review: Hydrating and smooth, doesn’t feel heavy.

name: Kritika Jain
review: I use it before makeup and it smoothens my skin really well. Glow looks natural.

review: Blends easily and gives a soft radiant glow. Works well for both daily and party looks.

name: Ayesha Khan
review: Subtle shine, not oily.

name: Tanvi Desai
review: Not too shiny, gives a soft glow which looks very natural in daylight.

name: Sneha Gupta
review: Perfect base for makeup. Skin feels smooth.

name: Radhika Iyer
review: I’ve been using the pink variant and it gives a fresh glow. Doesn’t clog pores and feels light.

name: Priya Nair
review: Nice everyday glow.

name: Shreya Bose
review: Good texture and easy to blend. Works well with foundation.

name: Divya Reddy
review: Glow is natural, not over the top.

review: Using this as a primer daily. Skin looks brighter and feels hydrated throughout the day.

name: Payal Agarwal
review: Gold shade is nice.

name: Mansi Shah
review: I like how it gives a dewy finish without making my skin oily.

name: Komal Arora
review: Easy to apply and blends well.

name: Tanya Bhatia
review: Great 3-in-1 product. Saves time and gives a soft glow. Works well even without makeup.

name: Aarti Singh
review: Good for daily use.

name: Pallavi Mishra
review: Lightweight and gives instant brightness.

name: Sonal Choudhary
review: The rose gold variant looks amazing on my skin tone. Very natural finish.

review: Nice product for daily wear. Doesn’t feel heavy and gives a decent glow.

name: Nisha Yadav
review: Smooth finish!

name: Bhavna Joshi
review: Hydrating and gives a soft glow.

name: Swati Kulkarni
review: Blends quickly and gives a radiant look without shimmer particles.

review: I’ve tried many strobe creams but this one feels the most natural. Perfect glow for daily use.

review: Love the glow.

name: Sakshi Verma
review: Works well as both primer and highlighter. Good value for money.
